heading: Compliance with title IX of Education Amendments of 1972
label: 40909 Compliance with title IX of Education Amendments of 1972
text: To comply with title IX of the Education Amendments of 1972 ( et seq.), the Administrator shall conduct compliance reviews of at least 2 grantees annually.20 U.S.C. 1681
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)40909.42 U.S.C. 16798(b), , .Pub. L. 109–155, title VI, § 619(b)119 Stat. 2935Dec. 30, 2005

References in TextThe Education Amendments of 1972, referred to in text, is , , . Title IX of the Act, known as the Patsy Takemoto Mink Equal Opportunity in Education Act, is classified principally to chapter 38 (§ 1681 et seq.) of Title 20, Education. For complete classification of title IX to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 92–31886 Stat. 235section 1681 of Title 20June 23, 1972
